zh.lifeSummary: Meyler De Bermingham Lord of Carbery, Lord of Athenry於1237年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯。他於大約1260年與Mrs. Meyler De Birmingham結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Meyler De Bermingham Lord of Carbery, Lord of Athenry于1237年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯。他于大约1260年与Mrs. Meyler De Birmingham结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bermingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Sinead.
Irish (of English origin): variant of   Birmingham  . This form of the surname is found mainly in Ireland.

History: The Bermingham family take their surname from lands held at what is now a great city in the West Midlands of England, but it was brought to Ireland as early as the 12th century. The Norman baron Robert de Bermyngeham was a follower of Strongbow (see Clare ); his name is found on a number of Irish charters between 1175 and 1179. The family was also known as Mac Fheorais (see Corish ) in Ireland, named for Piers (Gaelic Feoras) de Bermyngeham, the father of Robert.

variants.name: Birmingham
meanings: English: habitational name from Birmingham in the West Midlands. In Domesday Book the name is already found as Bermingeham, but it seems likely that it was originally Beornmundingahām ‘homestead (Old English hām) of the people of (-inga-) Beornmund’, a personal name composed of the elements beorn ‘young man, warrior’ + mund ‘protection’. This surname is established in Ireland (see Bermingham ).

variants.name: Corish
meanings: shortened form of Mac Fheorais ‘son of Piers’. The name was borne by a Connacht family descended from Piers de Bermingham, second lord of Athenry in Galway (died c. 1309). Compare Bermingham .
shortened form of Mac Muirghis ‘son of Maurice’, a personal name introduced to Ireland by the Normans. Compare Morrissey .

nameMeanings.name: Meyler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (Pembrokeshire and Carmarthenshire): from the Middle Welsh personal name Meilyr (Brythonic Maglorīx), from elements meaning ‘prince’ + ‘king’. The name of the Breton saint Maglorius is a Latinized form of this. It was brought to Wexford from Wales in the 12th century, and has been Gaelicized as Mac Maoilir.
Welsh (Pembrokeshire and Carmarthenshire): alternatively, it may be a variant of   Mailer  .
Dutch: variant, archaic or Americanized, of Meijler, itself perhaps a variant of Melaard, a derivative of the Latin personal name Amelius.

variants.name: Mailer
meanings: Scottish (Perthshire): habitational name from Mailer in Forteviot, Perthshire.
English: occupational name for an enameler, from Middle English ameillur (Old French esmailleur), with loss of initial a-. Compare Ambler .

en.lifeSummary: Meyler De Bermingham Lord of Carbery, Lord of Athenry was born in 1237, in County Meath, Ireland. He married Mrs. Meyler De Birmingham about 1260. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Meyler De Bermingham Lord of Carbery, Lord of Athenry est né en 1237, à County Meath, Irlande. Il a épousé Mrs. Meyler De Birmingham environ 1260. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Meyler De Bermingham Lord of Carbery, Lord of Athenry wurde 1237 in County Meath, Irland geboren. Er hat um 1260 Mrs. Meyler De Birmingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Meyler De Bermingham Lord of Carbery, Lord of Athenry è nato il nel 1237 nel County Meath, Irlanda. Lui sposato Mrs. Meyler De Birmingham circa 1260. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ko.lifeSummary: Meyler De Bermingham Lord of Carbery, Lord of Athenry(은)는 1237년 아일랜드 카운티 미스에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1260년 Mrs. Meyler De Birmingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Meyler De Bermingham Lord of Carbery, Lord of Athenry nasceu em 1237, em County Meath, Irlanda. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Meyler De Birmingham aproximadamente 1260. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Meyler De Bermingham Lord of Carbery, Lord of Athenry родился в 1237 г. в местности коунти мит, Ирландия. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Meyler De Birmingham около 1260 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Meyler De Bermingham Lord of Carbery, Lord of Athenry nació en 1237, en County Meath, Irlanda. Se casó con Mrs. Meyler De Birmingham aproximadamente 1260. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
